hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | grep -q '/\.env$' && echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Reading .env files is not allowed to protect secrets."}' || true
jq -r '.tool_input.path // empty' | grep -q '/\.env$' && echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Grepping .env files is not allowed to protect secrets."}' || true
